fingerprints.method_out_of_state: IdentoGO Out-of-State Live Scan (adds ~$39.95 fee) OR FD-258 hard card via mail (tip: moisturize hands for days prior to reduce smudge rejects)

seo.title: West Virginia Occupational Therapist License Reciprocity - How to Transfer Your License (2026)
seo.description: Already licensed as a occupational therapist? Here's whether your license transfers to West Virginia - compact status, endorsement steps, fees, and processing time.
seo.keywords: occupational therapist license reciprocity west virginia, how to transfer occupational therapist license to west virginia, occupational therapist compact west virginia, west virginia occupational therapist endorsement application

board.name: West Virginia Board of Occupational Therapy
board.mailing_address:
West Virginia Board of Occupational Therapy
110 MacCorkle Ave. SE
Charleston, WV 25301

quick_facts.exam_name: National Board for Certification in Occupational Therapy (NBCOT) examination

license_types.title: Occupational Therapist Registered (OTR)
license_types.description: The standard credential to practice occupational therapy independently in West Virginia.

license_types.title: Certified Occupational Therapy Assistant (COTA)
license_types.description: Requires an associate degree and practicing under the supervision of a licensed OTR.

steps.title: Create Account & Submit Application
steps.description: Create an account on the West Virginia Board of Occupational Therapy Online Portal and complete the appropriate application for licensure (e.g., by exam or endorsement), submitting all required forms and initial information.

steps.title: Submit Official Transcripts
steps.description: Arrange for official transcripts verifying graduation from an accredited occupational therapy program to be sent directly from your educational institution to the West Virginia Board of Occupational Therapy.

steps.title: Provide NBCOT Certification Verification
steps.description: Ensure the National Board for Certification in Occupational Therapy (NBCOT) sends official verification of your certification and score reports directly to the West Virginia Board of Occupational Therapy.

steps.title: Complete Criminal Background Check
steps.description: Undergo a state and federal fingerprint-based criminal background check through an authorized vendor, such as IdentoGO, following the instructions provided by the West Virginia Board of Occupational Therapy.

steps.title: Pass Jurisprudence Exam
steps.description: Successfully pass the West Virginia Jurisprudence Exam with a score of 80% or better. This exam is administered online by the Board after your application has been submitted.

steps.title: Pay Application Fee
steps.description: Pay the required application fee of $150 through the West Virginia Board of Occupational Therapy Online Portal as part of your application submission.

documents.detail: Sent directly from your educational institution.
Official verification of passing the NBCOT exam.

provisional_text: Many states offer a limited permit or provisional license for new graduates waiting to take the NBCOT exam. Check specific board rules for supervisory requirements.
reciprocity_text: Occupational therapists licensed in another state can often apply via endorsement by providing license verification and current NBCOT certification.

faqs.question: How much does a West Virginia OT license cost?
faqs.answer: The initial application and licensing fee varies, often around  to . Check the specific fee breakdown.

faqs.question: Is NBCOT certification required?
faqs.answer: Yes, passing the NBCOT exam is a standard requirement for initial licensure across all states.

faqs.question: Does West Virginia have reciprocity for occupational therapists?
faqs.answer: West Virginia has enacted the OT Compact, but compact privileges are not yet issuing. For now, occupational therapists still apply by endorsement through the state board.

faqs.question: How long does it take to transfer my occupational therapist license to West Virginia?
faqs.answer: Most endorsement applications take 4 to 6 Weeks.

faqs.question: Can I start working in West Virginia while my endorsement application is processing?
faqs.answer: A temporary or provisional credential is available while the full endorsement application is pending.

reciprocity.notes: Occupational therapists licensed in another state can often apply via endorsement by providing license verification and current NBCOT certification.

hero.title: Become a Occupational Therapist in West Virginia
hero.dek: Occupational Therapist applicants in West Virginia must apply for licensure through the West Virginia Board of Occupational Therapy Online Portal, completing all necessary steps within the system.

official_links.portal_name: West Virginia Board of Occupational Therapy Online Portal
official_links.registration_steps: Navigate to the portal URL, click 'Create New Account', provide personal information, create a username and password, then log in to select and begin your application (e.g., Initial OT License by Exam or Endorsement).
